label: Authentication Failure
description: Errors caused by invalid credentials, expired tokens, or failed auth handshakes.
example_keywords: 401, token expired, unauthorized, invalid API key, auth timeout
typical_resolution: Rotate credentials, refresh token, re-authenticate service account

label: Database Connection Timeout
description: Errors where the application cannot establish or maintain a database connection within allowed time.
example_keywords: connection timeout, DB unreachable, pool exhausted, socket hang
typical_resolution: Check DB health, increase pool size, investigate network latency

label: Third-Party API Failure
description: Downstream service or external API returned an error, timeout, or unexpected response.
example_keywords: 502 bad gateway, upstream timeout, external service error, partner API
typical_resolution: Check vendor status page, implement retry logic, activate fallback

label: Rate Limit Exceeded
description: Request volume exceeded the allowed threshold for a service, endpoint, or user account.
example_keywords: 429, too many requests, rate limit, quota exceeded, throttle
typical_resolution: Implement backoff, increase quota, distribute load

label: Data Validation Error
description: Input data failed schema validation, type checking, or business rule constraints.
example_keywords: schema mismatch, null field, invalid format, constraint violation, type error
typical_resolution: Fix upstream data, update validation logic, sanitise input

label: Insufficient Permissions
description: A service or user attempted an action they are not authorised to perform.
example_keywords: 403 forbidden, access denied, insufficient scope, IAM policy, role mismatch
typical_resolution: Review IAM roles, update permission policies, audit service accounts

label: Resource Exhaustion
description: System ran out of memory, CPU, disk space, or file descriptors.
example_keywords: OOM, out of memory, disk full, CPU throttle, file descriptor limit
typical_resolution: Scale infrastructure, optimise memory usage, purge old data

label: Network / Connectivity Issue
description: Request failed due to DNS resolution failure, packet loss, or unreachable host.
example_keywords: DNS failure, connection refused, network unreachable, host not found, ECONNREFUSED
typical_resolution: Check network config, firewall rules, VPC peering, DNS records
